notable_excerpts: The electric vehicle portfolio has moved from being under 10% of our domestic revenue to nearly 20% on a full year basis.
Chetak has clocked a market share of 25% in Q4 FY25, a rise of 12% points.
The electric 3-wheeler business has rapidly scaled up to being 20% of the commercial vehicles revenue.
We want to change the paradigm for both the drivers and passengers by bringing a well-engineered and reliable solution to an important last mile mobility challenge.
Our pilot vehicles have covered 10,000 kilometers of extensive testing to confirm the highest levels of build and best-in-class forms.
We have to be very mindful that there is currently a process of regulatory approvals that is being sought.
We will initiate a revamp of the entire governance framework as to what will happen at that point of time.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call highlighted Bajaj Auto's significant strides in the electric vehicle market, reflecting strong environmental initiatives. Social aspects were addressed through community mobility solutions and safety testing. Governance was discussed in terms of regulatory compliance and risk management, though details were less specific.
strengths: Strong growth in electric vehicle market share.
weaknesses: Limited specific details on governance improvements.
red_flags: Potential supply chain disruptions due to reliance on rare earth magnets from China.
